name: Hot Japanese Spinach Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the washed and drained spinach and bean sprouts in a 2-quart microwave-safe baking dish.
2. Cover the dish; microwave on High for 2 minutes.
3. Toss the vegetables; cover again and microwave for an additional 3 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, combine the sugar, vinegar, soy sauce, and toasted sesame seeds in a bowl. Stir until the sugar dissolves.
5. Pour the mixture over the vegetables and toss to combine.
